cases.title: GET /me without Authorization returns 401 with standard error envelope
preconditions: API server running at /api/v1
No Authorization header or session cookie on request
steps: GET /api/v1/me without bearer token
Inspect HTTP status and response body
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; body contains error object with stable code, message, requestId, and no user profile or role data exposed

cases.title: POST event registration without auth returns 401 before domain execution
preconditions: Published event in RegistrationOpen state with available capacity
No Authorization header on request
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with empty or omitted Authorization header
Verify no registration row is created for the request
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; registration is not created; satisfies AC-15 and NFR-07 requirement that authentication precedes sensitive operations

cases.title: GET organizer audit-logs without auth returns 401
preconditions: Event with existing audit log entries
No Authorization header on request
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/audit-logs without bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; audit log items are not returned

cases.title: Unauthenticated visit to protected participant route redirects to login with return URL
preconditions: Web app running with route guards enabled
Browser session has no stored JWT (fresh context or after sign-out)
Target route requires authentication (e.g. My registrations)
steps: Navigate directly to a protected participant route such as /my-registrations
Observe browser URL and page content
cases.expected: User is redirected to /login; intended destination is preserved as return URL query parameter or equivalent so post-login navigation can resume; no protected page content renders

cases.title: Unauthenticated visit to organizer area redirects to login
preconditions: Web app running with role-aware route guards
No authenticated session in browser
steps: Navigate directly to an organizer-only route (e.g. event management or dashboard under organizer shell)
Observe redirect behavior
cases.expected: User is redirected to /login (not access-denied); organizer UI does not render before authentication per page-list routing guidance

cases.title: GET /me/registrations without auth returns 401
preconditions: Participant has registrations in the system
Request omits Authorization header
steps: GET /api/v1/me/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 without bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; paginated registration data is not exposed to anonymous caller

cases.title: Auth middleware rejects unauthenticated POST /events before role or scope checks
preconditions: Event management module mounted with standard authorization decision pattern (authenticate → role → scope)
Request context has no authenticated actor
steps: Invoke POST /api/v1/events handler or service entry with valid JSON body but no auth context
Confirm handler short-circuits at authentication step
cases.expected: HTTP 401 returned; no event draft persisted; role and scope validators are not reached for unauthenticated actor per authorization decision pattern step 1

cases.title: Representative sensitive mutation endpoints consistently return 401 when unauthenticated
preconditions: Seeded event in RegistrationOpen state
No Authorization header on any request in this scenario
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations without token
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins without token
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/feedback without token
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/publish without token
cases.expected: Each request returns HTTP 401 (not 403, 404, or 500); no mutation side effects occur; authentication gate is uniform across sensitive write endpoints per NFR-07

cases.title: 401 responses use standard typed error contract with requestId
preconditions: API error middleware enabled
Unauthenticated request to any protected endpoint
steps: GET /api/v1/me without Authorization header
Parse JSON error body
cases.expected: Response body matches standard error envelope (error.code, error.message, error.requestId); status is 401; message is user-safe without stack trace per error-handling taxonomy

cases.title: Malformed JWT bearer token returns 401
preconditions: Protected endpoint available (GET /me)
Authorization header set to Bearer with invalid or truncated token string
steps: GET /api/v1/me with Authorization: Bearer not-a-valid-jwt
Inspect status and body
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; treated as missing/invalid auth token per authorization error taxonomy; no profile data returned

cases.title: Expired JWT returns 401 on protected endpoint
preconditions: JWT issued with past exp claim or fixed-clock test fixture
Protected endpoint GET /me/registrations
steps: GET /api/v1/me/registrations with Authorization bearer set to expired token
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; client must re-authenticate via POST /auth/login; registration list not returned

cases.title: Public auth endpoints remain accessible without bearer token
preconditions: No Authorization header
Valid signup/login payload available
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/register with valid email, password, displayName and no Authorization header
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials and no Authorization header
cases.expected: Both requests succeed (not 401); public endpoints explicitly marked in API design remain reachable without prior session; boundary between public and protected endpoints is correct

cases.title: After sign-out, protected route access redirects to login again
preconditions: User previously signed in with valid credentials
Client JWT cleared via TopBar sign-out (Flow 0b step 5)
steps: Sign out from TopBar user menu
Attempt to navigate to a protected route or trigger API call from stale client state
Observe redirect or API response
cases.expected: Browser redirects to /login for protected routes; any API call without refreshed token returns 401; sign-out clears session per FR-34

cases.title: Empty Authorization bearer value returns 401
preconditions: Protected endpoint GET /me available
steps: GET /api/v1/me with Authorization: Bearer (empty token after Bearer prefix)
cases.expected: HTTP 401 unauthenticated; equivalent to missing auth per error-handling authorization taxonomy

cases.title: Public login and signup routes do not redirect-loop when unauthenticated
preconditions: Fresh browser session with no JWT
steps: Navigate to /login
Navigate to /signup
Confirm neither route redirects away from auth pages
cases.expected: Login and signup pages render for unauthenticated users; no infinite redirect between protected shell and /login
